lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you do around here?

lines.speaker: Daryl
lines.text: I'm responsible for organising and selling off any surplus ranging supplies.

lines.speaker: Daryl
lines.text: Those fellows over in Lovakengj are an efficient bunch... They often produce far more than the army actually needs.

lines.speaker: Daryl
lines.text: I've got a wide selection of ranged weapons and ammo, if you wanted to take a look? Its all good stuff.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't think I need anything.
